transcription.text: 345 horses. That's more power than Ford or Chevy. It's got great looks. I got bonus cash. Three words. Gellman's Turbo Diesel. Heavy-duty power with 0% financing? Done deal. Hurry in now and join over a million proud new owners during the Dodge Spring Sales event to get the most award-winning lineup in our history. Qualified Daimler Chrysler lessees can lease a Ram 1500 quad-cab 4x4 with a V8 for $249 a month. Yeah, I got a Hemi. And a deal? Sweet.
